prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 58.3 kg; Height 172.9 cm; BMI 19.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 122/68 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.3%; 6 months ago 6.9%; 3 months ago 6.4%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 207mg/dL; 9 months ago 194mg/dL; 6 months ago 180mg/dL; 3 months ago 143mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 61.2kg; 9 months ago 57.7kg; 6 months ago 57.1kg; 3 months ago 56.3kg; current 58.3kg), Height (12 months ago 172.9cm; 9 months ago 172.9cm; 6 months ago 172.9cm; 3 months ago 172.9cm; current 172.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 121mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 121mmHg; current 122mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 66mmHg; 9 months ago 68mmHg; 6 months ago 66mmHg; 3 months ago 67mmHg; current 68mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 5U/L; 9 months ago 7U/L; 6 months ago 6.0U/L; 3 months ago 6.4U/L; current 10U/L), AST (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 23U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 16mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 16mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; current 11mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 1030mg/g; 9 months ago 706mg/g; 6 months ago 638mg/g; 3 months ago 614mg/g; current 811mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 89mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 131mg/dL; 9 months ago 133mg/dL; 6 months ago 131mg/dL; 3 months ago 132mg/dL; current 123mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.94 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
